name: @shroom/recorder
description: Deterministic screen-recorder core for shroom: owns the ffmpeg lifecycle (start/stop via tee → HLS + preview), reads a control fifo, writes events.ndjson.

scripts.test: ../runtime/run-node test/devices.test.mjs && ../runtime/run-node test/ffmpeg.test.mjs && ../runtime/run-node test/quality.test.mjs && ../runtime/run-node test/control.test.mjs && ../runtime/run-node test/lifecycle.test.mjs && ../runtime/run-node test/head-transcribe.test.mjs
